subject: WM-0164 unblocked; continue schema-v3 work
body: MSG-MREYCOIN-DC0D8D is resolved and taskctl restored WM-0164 to in_progress under the existing simulation-engineer claim Tally/WM-0164. Continue from the current dirty implementation. You may modify only apps/web/src/simulation-worker-session.test.ts under apps/: change schema-2 consumer assertions/fixtures to schema 3 and use a negotiated GameSession-compatible fixture where negotiation is exercised. Do not modify apps/web production source, product routes, UI, or add schema-2 protocol compatibility. Run the newly required focused Web test and every existing WM-0164 check before complete.
